name: Stellium
description: Fast transaction landing service for Solana using staked connections to validators and multi-path submission with low-latency networking.

api_key.location: URL path appended to the regional flashrpc.com host (e.g. https://fra1.flashrpc.com/$APIKEY)

tip_strategy: Alternate between different tip addresses for consecutive transactions
cost_on_failure: Not documented - unclear if tip is consumed on failed transactions

endpoints.route_note: The live docs document an explicit 'POST /fast' route for both single and batch transaction submission.
endpoints.infrastructure_note: Stellium's sender infrastructure is operated under the flashrpc.com domain. The API key is appended as the URL path on each regional host.

region_routing.lithuania: Not yet mapped to a flashrpc host; contact Stellium

rate_limits.scope: Total transactions sent by API key, regardless of individual or batch submission

sendTransaction.description: Submit a single transaction for fast landing
requirements: Transaction must include a system transfer instruction to a Stellium tip address
Alternate tip addresses for consecutive transactions

sendTransaction_batch.description: Submit multiple transactions in a single HTTP request
sendTransaction_batch.request_format: Array of JSON-RPC 2.0 sendTransaction request objects, each with a unique id
sendTransaction_batch.response_format: Array of JSON-RPC 2.0 response objects in the same order as the request array
behavior: Each transaction in a batch is processed independently
Individual transactions can succeed or fail independently
Responses maintain the same order as requests
Each request must have a unique id for correct response matching
Rate limits apply to total transactions across batch and individual submissions

features.staked_connections: Uses staked connections to validators for faster landing
features.multi_path_submission: Submits via multiple paths with low-latency networking
features.regional_endpoints: 8 regions available: Frankfurt, Amsterdam, New York, London, Tokyo, Dublin, Singapore, Lithuania
features.batch_support: Multiple transactions in a single HTTP POST
features.native_staking: Also offers native staking product (Maximum returns through Stellium Engine)
